errors.configuration: The current payment configuration is unavailable

checkout.title: Order payment
checkout.noQr: No usable payment code was returned

guidance.pendingTitle: Complete payment with the displayed code

guidance.delayedTitle: Payment confirmation is taking longer than usual

guidance.failedSubtitle: Discard this order and create a new one to try again.
guidance.cancelledSubtitle: This order was not paid. You can create a new recharge order.
guidance.expiredSubtitle: This order has expired. Create a new recharge order to continue.
